title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that the AI agent industry has normalized unreliability despite claims of high per-step accuracy. He contends that error compounding across multi-step workflows makes most agents impractical, and advocates for building reliable agents that work on the first try rather than focusing on raw performance metrics.
